summary:
The anterior surface of the cornea has the greatest impact on the eye’s ability to focus light primarily due to its high degree of curvature. This makes it essential for maintaining clear visual acuity through effective refraction at this point. \boxed{\text{Corneal Surface}} Summary:

The corneal surface provides most of the refractive power due to its significant curvature and transparency, playing a vital role in properly focusing light onto the retina. Therefore, the answer focuses on the importance of the corneal surface over other ocular components. \boxed{\text{Corneal Surface}}
